summary: Frontend UI overhaul testing complete - V3 Institutional Trading Architecture. All 19 tests passed (100%). V3 Signal Hero card positioned at top center of main content. Only MNQ and MES appear in asset selector (MYM/M2K removed). Right sidebar has 4 collapsible accordion sections: N1 Market Regime, N2 Confirmatory, N3 Execution, Technical Indicators. Each section has permanent summary card always visible. Confluence Score, Confidence Score, MTF Confluence correctly removed. All modals (SignalStack, Auto Trading) open/close correctly. Chart renders with DataBento data and filter toggles work.
passed_tests: ✅ V3 Signal Hero card displayed at top center of main content (x=336, y=71, width=1087)
✅ Only MNQ and MES appear in asset selector
✅ N1 Market Regime collapsible section present
✅ Confluence Score correctly removed from UI
✅ Confidence Score correctly removed from UI
✅ MTF Confluence correctly removed from UI
✅ N1 accordion expands to show VIX/Gamma/Term Structure/Treasury panels
✅ N2 accordion expands to show TICK/CVD/OFI panels
✅ N3 accordion expands to show Entry/SL/TP details
✅ Technical accordion expands to show VWAP/Volume Profile panels
✅ SignalStack modal opens and closes correctly
✅ Auto Trading modal opens and closes correctly
✅ Refresh Analysis button works and updates data
✅ V3 Force Execute button present (when status is not ACTIVE_SIGNAL)
✅ Chart filter buttons (7 total) work correctly
✅ No error elements found on page
test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend UI overhaul complete and verified. Key changes: 1) V3 Signal Hero card moved to top center of main content area (inside col-span-7 main section). 2) Only MNQ and MES in SYMBOLS array - MYM and M2K removed. 3) Right sidebar (col-span-3) has 4 collapsible accordion sections using @radix-ui/react-accordion via shadcn. 4) Each section has permanent summary card (always visible) + expandable details. 5) N1 shows regime/score, expands to VIX/Gamma/Term Structure/Treasury. 6) N2 shows PASSED/BLOCKED, expands to TICK/CVD/OFI. 7) N3 shows action (BUY/SELL/WAIT), expands to Entry/SL/TP. 8) Technical shows VWAP/POC summary, expands to indicators. 9) Confluence Score, Confidence Score, MTF Confluence completely removed. 10) DataBento chart has 7 filter toggles for levels. 11) SignalStack and Auto Trading modals work correctly.
